enrichment.headline: CEO at The Red Carnation Hotel Collection (Red Carnation Hotels)
enrichment.about: After almost forty years in the hospitality industry, I remain passionate about the opportunities that it offers to anyone who is prepared to work hard.

experience.title: CEO
experience.organization: The Red Carnation Hotel Collection (Red Carnation Hotels)
experience.description: Responsible for the global operation of approximately 20 luxury five-star hotels. Oversees strategy, team development, sustainability initiatives, and maintaining the group's reputation for exceptional service.

experience.title: Managing Director
experience.organization: The Red Carnation Hotel Collection (Red Carnation Hotels)
experience.description: Promoted from General Manager role. Led the collection's growth and operations across multiple countries including UK properties in London, Edinburgh, and Dorset.

experience.title: General Manager
experience.organization: The Rubens at the Palace (Red Carnation Hotels)
experience.description: Initial role upon joining the Red Carnation Hotel Collection.

education.degree_or_field: Higher National Diploma (HND) in Hotel Management

publications_or_projects: My Top Ten Travel Bucket List (May 2015)
activity_highlights: Shared that Red Carnation Hotels named UK Top Employer for 2026
Highlighted recognition as one of the Best Places to Work (twice in three years)
Featured guest on Travel Trends Podcast discussing luxury hospitality, leadership, and career journey
Posts on industry awards, team culture, sustainability in luxury hotels, and charity initiatives
enrichment.caveats: Full LinkedIn profile details (complete experience descriptions, skills) limited by public access/login wall. Pre-1998 career experience referenced but not detailed in sources. Education dates not publicly available.
